name: showToast
description: Triggers a toast notification from any action. Displays a temporary message to the user with configurable variant, duration, and position.

text.description: The message text to display in the toast notification.

variant.description: The visual variant of the toast indicating severity or intent.

duration.description: How long the toast is displayed in milliseconds before auto-dismissing.

position.description: Optional screen position for the toast (e.g., 'top-right', 'bottom-center').
